flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 36% at Azusa Pacific University vs the 2004–2008 baseline (3.0k vs 4.6k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Azusa Pacific University rose 32% between 2007 and 2010 ($10.5k → $13.9k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Azusa Pacific University fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (71.5% → 61.8%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Azusa Pacific University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1% → 0.0%).
